title: phanera wrayi var. wrayi
intro: Phanera wrayi var. wrayi, also known as the Phanera tree, is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Phanera wrayi var. wrayi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
